documentation: Perplexity is an AI-powered conversational search engine. It answers queries by synthesizing real-time web results and providing inline citations for accuracy and verifiability.
pricing: Basic is Free. Perplexity Pro is $20/month, allowing unlimited Pro searches and choice of foundational models (Claude, GPT-4o).
release_notes: Introduction of the Pages feature, allowing users to generate shareable, beautifully formatted reports from their searches.
